metadata.name: Partner Network Ontology
metadata.description: Foundation ontology for partner, agency, and affiliate relationships within the PF-Core platform ecosystem. 6 owned entities: Partner, Agency, Affiliate, Referral, CommissionRule, PartnerPayout. Supports multi-tier attribution (platform referrals + marketplace referrals), agency management of multiple client pies, affiliate tracking with configurable attribution windows, and automated commission payouts via the FairSlice revenue waterfall. 10 relationships (5 internal + 5 cross-ontology) bridging to ORG (partner identity), FAIRSLICE (revenue integration), GRC-FW (partner governance), EMC (instance management), and VSOM (channel strategy trace).
metadata.purpose: Provide the definitive model for partner onboarding, referral tracking, multi-tier attribution, agency management, and automated commission governance. Enables the Channel (Outer Loop) of the Triple-Loop engine: SaaS (Inner) to Marketplace (Middle) to Channel (Outer).
metadata.creator: Azlan EA-AAA

oaa:sourceFrameworks.name: PFC Platform Instance Architecture
applicability: PFC to PFI to Product to Client cascade for partner access
Unified Registry governance for partner contracts
RLS-based tenant isolation for agency access

oaa:imports.name: ORG-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Organisation identity and structure for partner entity modelling

oaa:imports.name: FAIRSLICE-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Platform economics — Pie, WaterfallRule, Distribution for revenue integration

oaa:imports.name: GRC-FW-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Governance framework for partner compliance and audit

oaa:imports.name: EMC-ONT
oaa:imports.description: Enterprise Model Composition for instance-level partner management

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Partner to Organisation Identity Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Partners are organisations — the partner entity extends the org identity with channel-specific properties
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Resolve partner identity, legal entity details, jurisdiction, and KYC status from the org graph

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Referral to Pie Revenue Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Partner referrals attach to pies and trigger waterfall steps for affiliate payouts and agency retainers
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: When revenue arrives at a pie with an active partner referral, automatically trigger commission payouts

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Agency Multi-Pie Management Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Agencies manage multiple client pies — the agency dashboard aggregates across all managed pies
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Agency super-admin view: toggle between client pies, view aggregate revenue, manage waterfall rules

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Partner Commission to Waterfall Distribution Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Commission rules determine how much a partner earns from each revenue event via the waterfall
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Calculate and distribute partner commissions automatically through the revenue waterfall engine

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Partner Governance and Compliance Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Partners are subject to GRC governance — KYC/AML, contract compliance, attribution integrity
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Enforce partner compliance: KYC checks before payout, attribution audit trail, contract governance

entities.name: Partner
entities.description: A channel partner in the PF-Core ecosystem. Partners earn revenue through referrals (affiliates), client management (agencies), consulting, integration, or reselling. Each partner has a tier (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum) determining commission rates and access levels. Partners are organisations (extends org:Organization) with channel-specific properties.

properties.name: partnerId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this partner

properties.name: partnerName
properties.description: Legal or trading name of the partner entity

properties.name: partnerType
properties.description: Partner classification: Agency, Affiliate, Reseller, Consultant, Integrator

properties.name: tier
properties.description: Partner tier: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum

properties.name: status
properties.description: Partner status: Applied, Active, Suspended, Terminated

properties.name: orgRef
properties.description: Reference to the org:Organization entity for this partner

properties.name: primaryContact
properties.description: Primary contact person name

properties.name: contactEmail
properties.description: Contact email address

properties.name: kycStatus
properties.description: Know Your Customer status: Pending, Verified, Failed, Expired

properties.name: kycVerifiedDate
properties.description: Date KYC verification was completed

properties.name: joinedDate
properties.description: Date the partner joined the programme

properties.name: jurisdiction
properties.description: Primary legal jurisdiction (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

properties.name: stripeConnectId
properties.description: Stripe Connect account ID for automated payouts

entities.name: Agency
entities.description: Specialisation of Partner. An Agency manages multiple client pies — they set up and run FairSlice instances for clients, earning a programmatic Management Fee (cash or equity) directly from the Revenue Waterfall. Agencies have a super-admin dashboard to toggle between client pies. Target GTM: Fractional CxO Agencies, Dev Shops, and Incubators.

properties.name: agencyId
properties.description: Unique identifier (extends partnerId)

properties.name: managementFeeType
properties.description: How the agency charges: Percentage, Fixed-Retainer, Equity-Stake, Hybrid

properties.name: managementFeeRate
properties.description: Fee rate (e.g., 5 for 5% of revenue, or 500 for $500/month retainer)

properties.name: maxClients
properties.description: Maximum number of client pies this agency can manage at their current tier

properties.name: activeClientCount
properties.description: Calculated: number of active referrals for this agency

properties.name: specialisations
properties.description: Agency domain specialisations: ['MarTech', 'FinTech', 'SaaS', 'AI/ML', 'GRC']

entities.name: Affiliate
entities.description: Specialisation of Partner. An Affiliate refers new users or startups to FairSlice, earning a percentage of the Platform Fee for each referred pie. Supports both Platform Referrals (user to user) and Marketplace Referrals (user to smart contract recommendation). Attribution windows are configurable (default 90 days).

properties.name: affiliateId
properties.description: Unique identifier (extends partnerId)

properties.name: referralCode
properties.description: Unique referral code used for tracking attribution

properties.name: attributionWindowDays
properties.description: Number of days a referral attribution remains active (default: 90)

properties.name: platformFeeShare
properties.description: Percentage of the platform fee earned per referred pie (e.g., 10 for 10%)

properties.name: marketplaceFeeShare
properties.description: Percentage of marketplace license fees earned from recommended smart contracts

properties.name: totalReferrals
properties.description: Calculated: total referrals made by this affiliate

properties.name: convertedReferrals
properties.description: Calculated: referrals that converted to active pies

entities.name: Referral
entities.description: A tracked referral linking a Partner to a specific Pie. Referrals are the core attribution mechanism — they determine which partner earns commission from a pie's revenue. Referral codes are immutable once attached (BR-PARTNER-001). Supports platform referrals (user invites user) and marketplace referrals (user recommends smart contract).

properties.name: referralId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this referral

properties.name: partnerRef
properties.description: Reference to the Partner (Agency or Affiliate) that made the referral

properties.name: pieRef
properties.description: Reference to the Pie this referral is attached to

properties.name: referralCode
properties.description: The referral code used (must match partner's assigned code)

properties.name: attributionType
properties.description: Type: Platform-Referral, Marketplace-Referral, Direct-Sale, Management-Fee

properties.name: status
properties.description: Referral status: Active, Expired, Converted, Cancelled

properties.name: createdDate
properties.description: Date the referral was created

properties.name: expiresDate
properties.description: Date the referral attribution expires (based on attribution window)

properties.name: convertedDate
properties.description: Date the referral converted (pie became active)

entities.name: CommissionRule
entities.description: A rule defining how a partner earns commission from a pie or platform event. Commission rules map to WaterfallRule entries in FairSlice — they define the rate, trigger, and conditions for partner payouts.

properties.name: ruleId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this commission rule

properties.name: partnerRef
properties.description: Reference to the Partner this rule applies to

properties.name: rateType
properties.description: Rate calculation: Percentage, Fixed-Amount

properties.name: rate
properties.description: Commission rate (percentage or fixed amount)

properties.name: triggerEvent
properties.description: What triggers this commission: Revenue-Event, Deal-Closed, Subscription-Renewed, License-Purchased, Pie-Created

properties.name: conditions
properties.description: Optional conditions: minimum revenue threshold, specific pie types, tier requirements

properties.name: cappedAt
properties.description: Maximum commission amount per event (null for uncapped)

properties.name: status
properties.description: Rule status: Active, Paused, Expired

entities.name: PartnerPayout
entities.description: A calculated or completed payout to a partner. Aggregates distributions from FairSlice waterfall for a given period. Supports multiple payment methods (Stripe Connect, bank transfer, equity allocation). Subject to KYC verification and governance audit.

properties.name: payoutId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this payout

properties.name: partnerRef
properties.description: Reference to the Partner receiving the payout

properties.name: periodStart
properties.description: Start of the payout period

properties.name: periodEnd
properties.description: End of the payout period

properties.name: totalAmount
properties.description: Total payout amount for this period

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Payout currency (ISO 4217)

properties.name: distributionRefs
properties.description: Array of FairSlice Distribution IDs that make up this payout

properties.name: status
properties.description: Payout status: Pending, Approved, Paid, Disputed, Reversed

properties.name: paymentMethod
properties.description: Payment method: Stripe-Connect, Bank-Transfer, Equity-Grant

properties.name: paidDate
properties.description: Date the payout was actually sent

properties.name: stripeTransferId
properties.description: Stripe transfer ID for tracking

relationships.name: Partner Has Referral
relationships.description: Links a Partner to their referral records

relationships.name: Referral Linked To Pie
relationships.description: Links a Referral to the FairSlice Pie it is attributed to

relationships.name: Partner Has Commission Rule
relationships.description: Links a Partner to their commission rules

relationships.name: Payout For Partner
relationships.description: Links a PartnerPayout to the Partner receiving it

relationships.name: Payout From Referral
relationships.description: Links a PartnerPayout to the Referral that generated it

relationships.name: Agency Manages Pie
relationships.description: Links an Agency to the client Pies it manages

relationships.name: Affiliate Refers User
relationships.description: Links an Affiliate to their referral chain

relationships.name: Commission Via Waterfall
relationships.description: Links a CommissionRule to the corresponding FairSlice WaterfallRule

relationships.name: Partner Is Organization
relationships.description: Partners extend org:Organization — legal entity identity, structure, jurisdiction

relationships.name: Partner Governed By GRC
relationships.description: Partners are subject to GRC governance — KYC, AML, contract compliance, attribution audit

businessRules.name: Immutable Referral Code
businessRules.condition: IF a referral code is attached to a Pie
businessRules.action: THEN the referral code and partner link MUST be immutable — cannot be changed, reassigned, or deleted (prevents commission hijacking, per NFR-08)

businessRules.name: Agency Client Limit
businessRules.condition: IF an Agency attempts to manage a new client Pie
businessRules.action: THEN the activeClientCount MUST NOT exceed maxClients for the Agency's current tier

businessRules.name: Attribution Window Enforcement
businessRules.condition: IF a Referral's createdDate + attributionWindowDays has passed
businessRules.action: THEN the Referral status MUST transition to Expired AND no further commissions are earned from that referral

businessRules.name: Commission Transparency
businessRules.condition: IF a CommissionRule is active for a Partner
businessRules.action: THEN the rule details (rate, trigger, conditions) MUST be visible to all members of pies linked to that partner's referrals

businessRules.name: Partner KYC Required
businessRules.condition: IF a Partner is to receive a PartnerPayout
businessRules.action: THEN the Partner's kycStatus MUST be Verified — payouts to unverified partners MUST be held in escrow

businessRules.name: Agency RLS Isolation
businessRules.condition: IF an Agency user accesses Pie data
businessRules.action: THEN RLS policies MUST enforce that the Agency can ONLY access pies for which they have an active Referral with attributionType=Management-Fee

businessRules.name: Multi-Tier Attribution Limit
businessRules.condition: IF a referral chain exceeds 2 levels
businessRules.action: THEN only the first 2 levels of attribution are eligible for commission (direct referrer + one override level). Deeper chains are tracked but not compensated.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Agency
hasDefinedTerm.description: Manages multiple client pies — earns management fees. Target: Fractional CxO agencies, dev shops.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Affiliate
hasDefinedTerm.description: Refers new users/startups — earns % of platform fee.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Reseller
hasDefinedTerm.description: Resells FairSlice subscriptions — earns margin.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Consultant
hasDefinedTerm.description: Provides strategic advisory — earns referral fees and consulting revenue.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Integrator
hasDefinedTerm.description: Builds integrations and connectors — earns from implementation services.

oaa:enumerations.name: PartnerTier
oaa:enumerations.description: Partner programme tiers with escalating benefits.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Bronze
hasDefinedTerm.description: Entry tier — up to 5 client pies, base commission rates

hasDefinedTerm.name: Silver
hasDefinedTerm.description: Proven tier — up to 15 client pies, +10% commission bonus

hasDefinedTerm.name: Gold
hasDefinedTerm.description: Established tier — up to 50 client pies, +20% commission bonus, priority support

hasDefinedTerm.name: Platinum
hasDefinedTerm.description: Strategic tier — unlimited client pies, +30% commission bonus, co-marketing, early access

hasDefinedTerm.name: Platform-Referral
hasDefinedTerm.description: User A invited User B — User A gets % of User B's SaaS fee

hasDefinedTerm.name: Marketplace-Referral
hasDefinedTerm.description: User A recommended Smart Contract X — User A gets % of the License Fee

hasDefinedTerm.name: Direct-Sale
hasDefinedTerm.description: Partner directly sold FairSlice subscription — earns margin

hasDefinedTerm.name: Management-Fee
hasDefinedTerm.description: Agency managing client pie — earns management fee from waterfall

hasDefinedTerm.name: Pending
hasDefinedTerm.description: Payout calculated, awaiting approval

hasDefinedTerm.name: Approved
hasDefinedTerm.description: Payout approved, queued for payment

hasDefinedTerm.name: Paid
hasDefinedTerm.description: Payout successfully sent to partner

hasDefinedTerm.name: Disputed
hasDefinedTerm.description: Payout disputed by partner or pie member

hasDefinedTerm.name: Reversed
hasDefinedTerm.description: Payout reversed due to fraud, error, or chargeback

hasDefinedTerm.name: Active
hasDefinedTerm.description: Referral is active and earning commission

hasDefinedTerm.name: Expired
hasDefinedTerm.description: Attribution window has passed

hasDefinedTerm.name: Converted
hasDefinedTerm.description: Referral converted to active pie

hasDefinedTerm.name: Cancelled
hasDefinedTerm.description: Referral cancelled by partner or system

bridges.description: Partners are organisations with legal entity identity
Referrals attach to FairSlice pies for attribution and commission
Commission rules execute through the FairSlice revenue waterfall
Partner governance — KYC/AML, contract compliance, attribution audit

crossOntologyReferences.description: PARTNER-ONT bridges to ORG (identity), FAIRSLICE (revenue integration), GRC-FW (governance), and EMC (instance management). Completes the Foundation series by adding channel partner entities alongside org, org-context, and org-mat ontologies.

changeControl.changeNotes: Initial release: 6 owned entities (Partner, Agency, Affiliate, Referral, CommissionRule, PartnerPayout). 10 relationships (5 internal + 5 cross-ontology). 7 business rules. 5 enumerations. 5 join patterns. Multi-tier attribution. Agency multi-pie management. Tier-based access. VP-RRR alignment: Problem=Risk (partner under-compensation), Solution=Requirement (automated attribution), Benefit=Result (channel velocity >1.5 Pies/Agency/Month). Epic 50 F50.2.

versionHistory.notes: Initial release. Partner network for SaaS channel economics. Agency management portal, affiliate tracking, multi-tier attribution, automated commission payouts via FairSlice waterfall. 5 cross-ontology bridges. Triple-Loop Outer Ring. Epic 50 F50.2.

competencyQuestions.question: Which agency partners are actively managing client pies and what are their management fees?
What is the total commission earned by affiliate X across all referred pies?
Which referrals are approaching attribution window expiry?
Is partner Y KYC-verified and eligible for payout?
